title: deer-flow.cumulative.hard v1
description: Cumulative-synthesis middleware fired the HARD threshold for an agent thread — count reached the configured hard limit and the agent gets a single grace turn before being force-exited. Producer: backend/packages/harness/deerflow/agents/middlewares/cumulative_synthesis_middleware.py. PRODUCER NOTE: live producer emits unversioned channel name `deer-flow.cumulative.hard`; this schema is filed against the canonical versioned name and validates the same data block (versioning cleanup tracked separately).

thread_id.description: LangGraph thread id this cumulative state belongs to

count.description: current cumulative count at the moment the threshold tripped

mode.description: cumulative-tracking mode (e.g. 'all', 'discovery') — selects which message classes count

threshold.description: configured hard-threshold value the count just met or exceeded
